summary: Processed the new bridge-free shifted-sideband advice. Reanalyzed the final refreshed-center r03 Ramsey allowing residual carrier shift and 13C sidebands; revised the conclusion to no unconditional numeric T2star, conditional order-3-us decay scale, and plausible nearby-13C shifted-sideband candidate evidence at 1.500000/1.884807/2.269613 MHz. Rewrote and built the revised closeout report, updated state/evidence/lab log/NV knowledge, disposed the advice inbox, and marked the project completed. No bridge job was enqueued, stopped, or mutated.

next_action.reason: Project lifecycle is completed after revised shifted-sideband closeout. No further bridge-touching work is runnable unless operator explicitly requests a new confirmation or protocol-development branch.
